title: Edit PhaseDetail.tsx to add build output, verification, and review sections
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseDetail.tsx

Read the existing file and the verification types. Make these changes:

1. Import { VerificationReport } from '../../worker/verification'
2. Import VerificationChecklist component (create a simple inline version if the import fails)
3. Replace the grayed-out Build Output placeholder with a real section showing: implementation summary, artifact links, notes (from BuildOutput props)
4. Replace the grayed-out Review placeholder with a real review form:
   - Decision dropdown: Accepted, ReworkRequired, ConditionallyAccepted, Closed
   - Comments textarea
   - Impact on future phases textarea
   - Save Review button
5. Add verification section between Build Output and Review showing the VerificationChecklist
6. Add props: buildOutput (BuildOutput | null), review (Review | null), verificationReport (VerificationReport | null), onSaveReview callback
7. The Review section should only be editable if verification has been run (verificationReport is not null)
8. Keep the Revision Events section as a placeholder still

Commit.
